title: CASEINCOMPLETE warning on unique case with enum

features.name: enum with fewer values than underlying bit width
features.description: Code should include an enum declaration where the number of explicitly defined enum values is less than 2 raised to the power of the bit width of the underlying type

features.name: unique case on enum with default clause
features.description: Code should include a unique case statement on an enum variable that has a default clause and all defined enum values are covered across the case items
features.snippet: unique case (State) S0,S1,S2,S3,S4: Z = 0; S5: Z = 1; default: Z = 1'bX; endcase

features.name: enum used in case expression with partial value coverage
features.description: Code should include a case expression using an enum where only a subset of defined enum values are explicitly matched in case items
features.snippet: unique case (State) S0: Next = S1; S1: Next = S2; endcase
